data.description: NVIDIA Jetson Thor uses or builds on RoboGen.
HumanoidGen: Data Generation for Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation via LLM Reasoning discusses RoboGen.
RoboGen cites Vision-Language-Action in Robotics: A Survey of Datasets, Benchmarks, and Data Engines.
The reality gap between simulation and real-world physics constrains how effectively synthetic data engines such as RoboGen transfer to real robots.
RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context uses or builds on RoboGen.
Wang et al. (2026) discuss RoboGen as an LLM-driven automatic task-generation framework for simulation.
